subcodes.first_line: O friends! Trustworthiness is even as the resplendent sun that illumineth the world, whose heaven is man and whose horizon is the pure heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان امانت بمثابه آفتاب جهانتاب است و آسمان او انسان و افقش قلب نیکو
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @the power of words; of speech, @call to action
